channel.title: Derek Wakefield
channel.description: Assistant Professor of Political Science, Bucknell University

item.title: Gem Wars — Lore (v0.33)
item.description: Canonical lore for Gem Wars' three sentient elements — Mud, Lava, Water — and the factions they became. Origins, death semantics, gem-relationships, visual register, and a small canon of stories. Pinned so engine, art, and writing all reference the same source.

item.title: The Friends We Find Along the Way
item.description: An essay about looking for the eko and finding the demon — written in four registers, two lengths, and five ASCII densities. One page, lots of toggles.

item.title: A Voice That Listens
item.description: My month with Claude. One page; a toggle at the top switches between the short (Modern Love–shaped) and long (ten-section) versions.

item.title: Sinatra et al. 2016 — three-page memo
item.description: A short reading note on the Q-model, the random impact rule, and the co-authorship-asymmetry inference rule that powers the Coffee Shop visualization.

item.title: The Bobble Canon
item.description: Numerous short parables, a handful of Bobbisms, a few codas, and a glossary. Kept by Derek. Tended by Claude. Bobbled accordingly.

item.title: Introduction to Bobbology
item.description: Lecture I — a field guide to the audible compass and its relations: Bobbles, Ekos, Vessels, and Daemons. How memory works in ekos. Why humans hold the pen at the decision gate.
